'''Phan Riizolo''' was a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] associated with the [[Invids]] and the captain of the ''[[Booty Full]]''. He was [[Battle of Alakatha|captured]] by [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] at [[Alakatha/Legends|Alakatha]] in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]], after attempting to leave the Invids in order to strike out on his own.

==Appearances==
*''[[I, Jedi]]'' {{Ab|I, Jedi (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
